micropython.source:
# Imports go at the top
from microbit import *
import music

stepcount = 0
steplength = 0.6
display.show(0)
music.play(['c4:4'])

while True:
    if button_a.is_pressed():
        music.play(['c3:2'])
        display.show(Image.HEART)
        sleep(400)
        stepcount += 1
        display.clear()
    if button_b.is_pressed():
        display.scroll(stepcount*steplength)
    if pin_logo.is_touched():
        display.scroll(stepcount)
